layman_headline: Ethereum shows early signs of recovery while the broader market trembles in fear.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a state of fear, but that fear is improving — it went from 25 yesterday to 33 today. Ethereum has printed a strong bullish candlestick pattern called 'Three White Soldiers,' which means three days in a row of solid buying. Bitcoin recently touched $66K before pulling back, and Ethereum is holding up well near $1,943 with support just below at $1,900. This looks like a controlled dip-buy opportunity on the second-largest crypto asset.
layman_action: Consider a small position in Ethereum around $1,920, with a plan to sell near $2,050 for roughly 6-7% profit. Set a hard stop-loss at $1,870 to limit downside to about 2.5%.
expert_reasoning: ETH presents the cleanest swing setup among all candidates. The Three White Soldiers candlestick pattern on the daily chart signals sustained buying pressure with 5-day momentum of +19.7%, yet the RSI at 43.85 shows it's far from overbought — plenty of room to run. Support at $1,900 is only 1.4% below current price, while resistance at $2,000 is 3.8% above, giving a favorable 2.84x risk/reward. The improving Fear & Greed Index (25→33, trending up) historically correlates with bottoming behavior in quality assets. BTC's 9K daily outflow from Binance suggests smart money accumulation, which typically benefits ETH as the primary alt. The main headwind is 56.6% BTC dominance suppressing alts, but ETH's relative strength (+0.37% vs BTC's -1.29% today) suggests capital rotation may be beginning.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.6% continues to suppress alt performance — if BTC drops sharply, ETH will likely fall harder
ETH is still in a macro downtrend (below major MAs, -60.7% from ATH), and this bounce could be a dead cat rally
The $2,000 psychological resistance is a major barrier that has rejected price multiple times
watch_list: BTC price action around $66K — a decisive break above confirms risk-on, rejection sends alts lower
Fear & Greed Index trajectory — needs to continue improving above 35-40 to confirm sentiment shift
ETH daily close relative to $1,900 support — a close below invalidates the bullish candle pattern
market_context: The crypto market is in 'Fear' territory at 33/100 but improving rapidly from 25 yesterday. BTC recently touched $66K with significant exchange outflows suggesting accumulation, though high BTC dominance at 56.6% remains a headwind for altcoins.
context_banner: Improving fear sentiment and bullish ETH candlestick patterns create a measured dip-buy opportunity on the market's most liquid altcoin.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed improving from 25 to 33 (trend: improving) — historically reliable signal (67% win rate) suggesting sentiment bottoming and a favorable entry window.
Bitcoin analysis highlights 'serious volume' after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow — institutional accumulation signal that benefits ETH as primary alt.
ETH Three White Soldiers bullish candlestick pattern with 2.84x risk/reward ratio to nearest support/resistance levels — reliable pattern signal (67% win rate).
ETH RSI at 43.85 is neutral-to-low, confirming the rally has room to extend before hitting overbought territory — RSI is our most reliable signal at 83% win rate.
Bitcoin broke $66K but signals show the rally is 'far from normal' — cautious optimism warrants measured position sizing rather than aggressive entry.
